name: qwen_train_ref
purpose: Serenity Qwen cached-data train parity dump contract for predict -> loss -> backward_lora -> optimizer gates.

step_safetensors_keys.cached_batch: batch.* tensors exactly as Serenity data_loader yields them, including latent_image, tokens, tokens_mask, text_encoder_hidden_state, loss_weight, concept_type, and optional latent_mask.
step_safetensors_keys.trace: trace.* tensors captured from Serenity BaseQwenSetup.predict, QwenModel.encode_text, QwenModel.scale_latents, QwenModel.pack_latents, and QwenImageTransformer2DModel.forward. Expected keys include text_encoder_output, text_attention_mask, scaled_latent_image, latent_noise, scaled_noisy_latent_image, sigma, packed_latent_input, transformer_hidden_states, transformer_timestep, encoder_hidden_states, optional encoder_hidden_states_mask, packed_predicted_flow, and flow.
step_safetensors_keys.outputs: output.timestep, output.predicted, output.target, optional output.prior_target, output.loss_pre_scale, and output.loss_for_backward.

adapter_safetensors_keys.initial: adapter_initial.* trainable Qwen LoRA tensors when --adapter-dump initial is used.
adapter_safetensors_keys.step: adapter_before.*, adapter_pre.*, adapter_post.*, and adapter_after.* trainable Qwen LoRA tensors when named trainable params are exposed.
adapter_safetensors_keys.step-with-grads: adapter_before.*, adapter_pre.*, adapter_pre_clip.*, adapter_pre_clip_grad.*, adapter_post.*, adapter_post_clip.*, adapter_post_clip_grad.*, and adapter_after.* trainable Qwen LoRA tensors/gradients.

bounded_run_notes: The script is single-process only and enforces --max-steps 1.
By default it requires existing image/text caches and does not rebuild them. Pass --allow-cache-build to let Serenity create missing caches.
It imports Serenity from /home/alex/Serenity and chdirs there before importing modules.util.create because Serenity factory.import_dir uses cwd-relative paths.
It preserves tensor storage dtype in safetensors dumps; scalar stats in JSON are computed in float32 where needed.
It does not call GenericTrainer.end(), so it does not perform Serenity final model saves.
It does not edit Serenity source or Mojo runtime files.
